name: the universal semantic detector passes content that is compatible with an arbitrary inline rule body
command: printf 'const r = JSON.parse(x);\n' > ok.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/prose-judge.sh" --rule any-rule --body "code must never call eval" --forbid "eval(" --paths ok.js 2>e.txt; grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo prose-judge-inline-green 1>&2
